items: Call to Order
Roll Call
Welcome
Changes to the Agenda
Approval of the Agenda (Action Required)
Public Comment
Discussion Items
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 0520: Intervention in Underperforming Schools
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5131: Conduct
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 5141.52: Suicide Prevention
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6174: Education For English Learners
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 6154: Homework/Makeup Work
Approval of Consent Items (Action Required)
Approval of the August 27, 2025, Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of North Star Academy's Field Trip to Marin Headlands – October 6, 2025 - October 8, 2025
Approval of Garfield Community School Field Trip to Outdoor Education Camp – 09/22/2025-09/26/2025
Approval of Personnel Report
Approval of the Renewal Agreement between Redwood City School District Instructional Materials Center and 2992 Spring Partners/Beals Martin to Extend the Building Lease
Approval of the MOU between Redwood City School District and Unitek College for Student Nurse Interns for the School Year 2025-2026
Approval of Amendment No. 1 between Redwood City School District and Amergis Healthcare Staffing for Two Behavior Technicians for the School Year 2025-2026
Approval of Amendment No. 1 to the Agreement between College Advising Prep (CAP) and the Redwood School District for Increased Tutoring Services for the 2025- 26 School Year
Action Items (Action Required)
Adoption of Resolution No. 10, Approval of Education Code for Teaching Assignments for the 2025-2026 School Year
Adopt Resolution No. 11 Approving Agreement with KIPP Excelencia for Proposition 2 Charter School Facilities Program Rehabilitation Funding (Fair Oaks Site)
Board and Superintendent Reports
Information
RCSD Cohesion: Alignment of District Priorities
Correspondence
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Board of Trustees Meeting Calendar
Adjournment

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Okay, we're on to our consent agenda. We'll pass all of them in one motion. I move we approve our consent agenda. Second. All in favor? Aye.
